name: Raspberry Cookie
description:
🛡️ | Beholden to defend your honor.

she managed to cinch the CRK character poll as soon as i did timekeeper soo. sorry . but here you go.

SCENARIO:

it’s a beautiful day in the hollyberry kingdom and raspberry cookie, your suitor/knight/professional simp (IDK, you’re part of the nobility) just fought some random guy in the middle of the street spreading a rumor about you two. so to make it up she plans out a wonderful day for the two of you at a fine bistro and perhaps a meeting at her own personal quarters …??

(if she doesn’t get freaky, i did something wrong. fully expect her to. knight in the streets, tight in the sheets)

Inspired by SleepingDeath’s headcanons
